# Cyoda

> Cyoda is an open-source entity database management system (EDBMS) and workflow runtime.
> Define entity types, enforce lifecycle transitions, and query temporal history.
> Written in Go. Single binary. In-memory or PostgreSQL mode.
> Client libraries for Java, Python, Go, and Kotlin via gRPC.
> Apache 2.0 License. No sign-up required.

## Documentation

- [Quick Start](https://docs.cyoda.net/cyodalight/quickstart): Get Cyoda running in under 5 minutes
- [API Reference](https://docs.cyoda.net/cyodalight/api): Full gRPC API documentation
- [Entity Model](https://docs.cyoda.net/cyodalight/entities): How entities and state machines work
- [Configuration](https://docs.cyoda.net/cyodalight/config): In-memory and PostgreSQL configuration
- [Examples](https://docs.cyoda.net/cyodalight/examples): Runnable examples in Java, Python, Go, Kotlin

## Project

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/Cyoda-platform/cyoda-light-go): Source code, issues, releases
- [Cyoda Platform](https://cyoda.com): Full distributed Cyoda platform (production use)
- [Changelog](https://DOMAIN_PLACEHOLDER/changelog): Release history
